Information

Tutorial

PC / Placeholder

1. Go to the item you want to download
2. Click the download button
3. Open Minecraft and go to Marketplace
4. Find the item in your library

Mobile / Placeholder

1. Find the desired item in the app
2. Tap the download button
3. Open Minecraft Pocket Edition
4. The item will be in your profile

Item Fusion

World

Use Fusion Magic to create new and wonderful items! Fuse items together to combine their unique abilities. Blast off with the gunpowder-feather or shoot fireballs while healing with the fire charge-golden apple! - 231 Item Fusions - Unique fusion mechanics - Mix and match powerful abilities Create custom items that defy imagination! By Lifeboat

Lifeboat
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aWPA_5YpTJE

TNT Mob Fusion

World

Mobs that go BOOM! Capture mobs into spawn eggs and turn them into TNT with some explosive fusion results. One TNT spawns a new type of evoker that summons lines of kabooms! Chicken types fly over your head and drop dynamite. You can even "milk" buckets of TNT from the explosive cow.
- 16 new fusion mobs
- 15 TNT fusions
- New villager with explosive sales


Have a blast!

Lifeboat
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bZ2B_KnnpGI

Pixel Drop

World

- Includes three settings: ice city, mineshaft dungeon, and nether fortress
- Test your knowledge in singleplayer or multiplayer

Your family's ranch has fallen on hard times and it is time for you to pick up the work as a rancher! Breed chickens, ducks, cows or even llamas or pigs. Cruise around your stunning ranch and turn it into a home filled with animals!

Escape from a creepy mansion infested with hands! Grab your lantern, it's very dark ahead. Solve puzzles and out smart the hands to get out. Can you make it all the way through this creepy place without getting caught in the hand's grasp?

- Single Player mini-game
- By Kiptrix and Pathway Studios

By Pathway Studios

Pathway Studios
https://youtube.com/Minecraft

Blocktris

World

A new block-stacking challenge, where you're in play! Chickens are falling from the sky, and place a block where they land. In this confined tube, you must use your Minecraft skills and not let the blocks stack to the top.
- Hours of gameplay
- 2 difficulty modes
- 70+ rounds of blocks to mine
- Perfect for Prisons fans

Falling chickens and block stacking mayhem!

Lifeboat
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QT1dTD4C9es

World

+ 26 craftable buildings
+ Creative and fresh gameplay
+ Suitable for role-play and multiplayer with friends

Domino

World

This is a single and multiplayer domino simulation. You knock down flags to increase your score. Some dominos spin, and some jump, making the challenge more difficult and timing important. Each track has a x10 maximum score over the last one. Each reset of the track erodes your score. You trade score for player-placed dominos so you can create your own domino tracks.
